name: Chair Oren of Dinye
backstory: Chair of Dinye since the 409 demand. Believes in the Bloc.

narrative_context.secret: Oren agreed to a back-channel mediation with the Akeia matriarch six annums ago.

name: Registrar Kira
backstory: Records every birth, death, and migration through Dinye Gate.

narrative_context.secret: Kira's grandmother was Fluxom-born; the lineage is hidden.

name: Guard-Captain Volk
backstory: Has refused two outsider envoys this annum.
